text.title: Spring Boot Patterns Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure to scaffold or harden a Spring Boot 3 layered service end-to-end.

step.name: convert-to-constructor-injection
step.action: Replace `@Autowired` fields with `private final` + constructor. Use Lombok `@RequiredArgsConstructor` for brevity. Run an ArchUnit rule banning field injection.
step.decision-gate: If field injection remains, BLOCK per `constructor-injection` rule.

step.name: define-records-and-mapstruct
step.action: For each entity define a request record and a response record. Add `@Mapper(componentModel = "spring") interface FooMapper`. Configure the MapStruct annotation processor in `pom.xml`.
step.decision-gate: If hand-written mapper or `BeanUtils.copyProperties` is found, BLOCK per `mapstruct-for-mapping` rule.

step.name: scaffold-controllers-and-services
step.action: For each endpoint add `@RestController` (validate via `@Valid`, delegate to service, return record). `@Service` carries business logic; class-level `@Transactional(readOnly = true)` with write methods overriding.
step.decision-gate: If `@Transactional` lands on controller / repository, fail per `transactional-on-service` rule.

step.name: add-problemdetail-advice
step.action: Add a single `@RestControllerAdvice` mapping each domain exception (`ResourceNotFoundException`, `ConflictException`, `ValidationException`) to RFC 7807 `ProblemDetail` with the appropriate status.
step.output: One advice covering the whole module
step.decision-gate: If a controller catches business exceptions itself, BLOCK per `advice-not-per-controller` rule.

step.name: harden-repository-with-pagination
step.action: Repository list methods take `Pageable` and return `Page<DTO>` (project entity â†’ DTO inside the service `@Transactional`). Use `@EntityGraph`/`JOIN FETCH` for required associations.
